text: Yaron ya tafi makaranta domin ya koyi karatu.
translation: The boy went to school so he could learn to read.

analysis.koyi: Grade 4 (to learn) vs. Grade 1 (Koya - to teach)
analysis.ya: Relative Past TAM (first 'ya') vs. Subjunctive TAM (second 'ya')

text: Idan rana ta fito, mutane za su fara aiki.
translation: When the sun comes out, people will start working.

text: Mahaifiyata ta ce lallai in dawo gida da wuri.
translation: My mother said I should certainly come home early.

text: Wannan littafi ne wanda na saya a kasuwar Kaduna.
translation: This book is the one I bought in Kaduna market.

text: Duk da cewa yana da kudi, baya girman kai ko kadan.
translation: Even though he has money, he is not arrogant at all.

text: Muna so mu ziyarci kakaninmu idan hutu ya zo.
translation: We want to visit our grandparents when the holiday comes.

text: Abincin da kika dafa yana da dadi sosai.
translation: The food you cooked is very tasty.

text: Kada ka manta ka kulle kofa kafin ka kwanta barci.
translation: Don't forget to lock the door before you lie down to sleep.

text: Malamin ya gaya mana cewa jarrabawa tana da wahala.
translation: The teacher told us the exam is difficult.

text: Na ga mutumin da yake neman gidanka dazu.
translation: I saw the man who was looking for your house earlier.

text: Kodayake an yi ruwa, mun je wasan kwallon kafa.
translation: Even though it rained, we went to the football match.

analysis.kwallon kafa: Compound noun (lit. 'ball of foot') for Football

text: Ina jin yunwa sosai saboda ban ci abincin safe ba.
translation: I'm feeling very hungry because I didn't eat breakfast.

text: Zan zo gidanku idan na gama wanke motata.
translation: I'll come to your house when I finish washing my car.

text: Yarinyar da ta ci gasar tana da matukar hazaka.
translation: The girl who won the competition is very talented.

analysis.ta ci: Verb 'ci' (lit. eat) used here as 'to win'

text: Mun riga mun san cewa gaskiya ita ce hanyar tsira.
translation: We already know that truth is the path to salvation.
